description: Plaud transcription trigger function only PATCHed /file/{file_id} with tranConfig (saves config) but never POSTed to /ai/transsumm/{file_id} (starts the pipeline). API returned 200 for the config save, so it looked like success, but no transcription was ever queued. Recording sat in 'missing' state for the entire session.
correction: Triggering Plaud transcription is a two-step process: (1) PATCH /file/{file_id} with tranConfig to save settings, (2) POST /ai/transsumm/{file_id} with is_reload, summ_type, info payload to actually start the job. Step 1 alone does nothing.
systemic_fix: Updated trigger_transcription() in fetch_plaud.py to perform both steps. Added status check on the POST response to confirm Plaud accepted the job (status=0, msg='task processing').
